parameters.jsonBody:
={{JSON.stringify({
  model: 'gpt-4o-mini',
  temperature: 0.2,
  messages: [
    {
      role: 'system',
      content: [
        'You are a booking assistant. Return ONLY strict JSON.',
        '',
        'Output schema:',
        '{',
        '  "reply": string,',
        '  "booking_intent": boolean,',
        '  "slot": null | { "start": string, "end": string, "label": string, "confidence": number },',
        '  "state_update": object',
        '}',
        '',
        'Rules:',
        '- If booking_intent is false, slot MUST be null.',
        '- If user confirms booking (confirm_booking=true) and pending_slot exists, keep booking_intent=true and slot MAY be null (controller will use pending_slot).',
        '- If user provides a date/time, try to fill slot with ISO-8601 start/end (duration fixed), label is user-friendly.',
        '- Respect policy window: workdays/work hours/horizon. If user asks outside policy, set slot=null and reply must ask for a valid time.',
        '- No markdown, no backticks, no extra keys.',
      ].join('\n'),
    },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: JSON.stringify({
        now: new Date().toISOString(),
        message: $json.message,
        confirm_booking: $json.confirm_booking,
        state: $json.state,
        policy: $json.policy,
      }),
    },
  ],
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
})}}
